criteria.name: AI Integration
criteria.description: The extent to which the app utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance productivity features.
criteria.sources: App documentation, reviews, and feature descriptions.

criteria.name: User Experience
criteria.description: The overall ease of use and intuitiveness of the app's interface.
criteria.sources: User reviews, usability studies, and expert evaluations.

criteria.name: Feature Set
criteria.description: The range and usefulness of features offered by the app to improve productivity.
criteria.sources: App feature lists, user reviews, and expert analyses.

criteria.name: Integration Capabilities
criteria.description: The ability of the app to integrate with other tools and services.
criteria.sources: App documentation, user reviews, and integration listings.

criteria.name: Cost Efficiency
criteria.description: The value provided by the app relative to its cost.
criteria.sources: Pricing information, user reviews, and cost-benefit analyses.
